LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT IRINA D'AMATO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 1, 2018 DUE TO MS. D'AMATO'S LATER FILING OF HER DECLARATION. PLAINTIFF'S ASSIGNEE MAY FILE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO THE MOTION NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 23, 2018. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT IRINA D'AMATO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PER LABOR CODE 98(F), MS. D'AMATO MAY NOT SEEK ANY RELIEF IN THIS COURT UNLESS AND UNTIL SHE MAKES AN APPLICATION FOR THE SAME RELIEF TO THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Defendant Irina D'Amato'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Theresa J. Bichsel, Esq. 415-486-2083 from the Labor Commission's Office, Dept. of Industrial Relations, for Intervenor Labor Commissioner.
Iona Irina D'Amato (no phone number given) Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant reports the EDD account is fraudulent. The Court explains the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Irina D'Amato'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment.

Irina D'Amato's motion to set aside judgment is denied. Per Labor Code 98(f), Ms. D'Amato may not seek any relief in this court unless and until she makes an application for the same relief to the Labor Commissioner.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Defendant Irina D'Amato'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Continued To Mar-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ioana Irina D'Amato (no phone number given) Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Irina D'Amato's Motion To Set Aside Judgment.

Defendant Irina D'Amato's motion to set aside judgment is continued to March 1, 2018 due to Ms. D'Amato's later filing of her declaration. Plaintiff's assignee may file opposition papers to the motion no later than February 23, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
